rationale: Both correctly diagnose the None+1 crash from the base tokenizer lacking <img_ratio_33..36>, cite the same hunyuan_image3.py:1561-1563 snippet, give the same dit.yaml workaround, and correctly land on 'close with follow-up tracking issue' matching Gaohan123's actual resolution. X is more grounded, citing specific line numbers in both YAML configs (hunyuan_image_3_moe.yaml:1, hunyuan_image3_dit.yaml:1-5) and the downstream consumer of _ratio_other_slices (1566-1567), and it supplies an actual code diff for the proposed guard rather than just describing one. Y adds a plausible but unverified third config (hunyuan_image3_ar.yaml) in its reference table that isn't grounded in the thread or cited code. Both are comparably complete, so this is a slight edge to X on grounding/specificity rather than a decisive gap.
